message: Node started: Implement the main.py script based on the strategy provided by the geometry_strategist. The script must read N and then N lines of (xi, yi, ri) from stdin. It must output N lines of (x1, y1, x2, y2) representing the rectangles [x1, x2) x [y1, y2). Ensure the code is efficient enough for competitive programming constraints, handles the 10000x10000 boundary, and strictly follows the output format without any extra text or markdown.
